description.content: Public market data (no authentication required)
Returns the list of supported instruments and their metadata.
Returns instrument trading status (open, paused, etc.).
Returns the latest ticker for every instrument.
Returns the latest ticker for a single instrument.
Returns the order book for a single instrument.
Returns recent public trade history for an instrument.
Order placement, edit, and cancellation
Places a new futures order (lmt, mkt, stp, take_profit, ioc).

Cancels every open futures order, optionally scoped to a single instrument.

API key checks

Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

OpenAPI description of the Kraken Futures (formerly Crypto Facilities) REST API v3. Covers trading (send/edit/cancel orders, batch), market data (instruments, tickers, orderbook, history), account data (accounts, open positions, open orders, fills), transfers, account history, and charts. Generated by the API Evangelist pipeline from docs.kraken.com/api/docs/futures-api/.
